who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-50 invoices/month, inconsistent supplier performance evaluation causes late orders and missed discounts. We automate scorecard generation instead of manual scorecard creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent supplier performance evaluation leading to late orders and missed discounts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on procurement challenges
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums for procurement tools and tips
try_it: Let users try template-based scorecard generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
